narrative: The institutional BSL-3 suite is registered under HHS/CDC Form 1 for Bacillus anthracis (a Tier 1 select agent), with all 14 personnel holding current Security Risk Assessments approved by the FBI CJIS and bi-annual occupational health clearance. Inventory of viable material is reconciled weekly against the CDC Form 4 long-form inventory using a two-person dual-key freezer access procedure, with no variance over the last four quarters. BSC-II cabinets received their annual NSF/ANSI 49 certification in March, and the HEPA push-through filters passed PAO integrity testing at less than 0.01% leakage. A proposed aerosol-challenge protocol underwent institutional DURC review and HHS P3CO Framework evaluation prior to initiation. Intra-entity transfers used APHIS/CDC Form 2 authorization. Autoclave loads carry biological indicators (Geobacillus stearothermophilus) and parametric records retained 3 years. The annual APR was submitted on time; no theft, loss, or release events occurred this reporting cycle.
